verdict: Phase 10 #00c-2 HDC binding-half wired into _structural_cosines as tunable blend signal (binding_weight=0.5). Compared 5-seed structural-only vs structural+binding. As predicted by the corpse-spec analysis (fact_graph alone shatters every Phase 9 dataset target), the binding signal does NOT add measurable lift on this dataset — see delta column. Mechanism is sound (unit tests verify unbinding recovers subject-specific signal); future phases (P11+ cortical column ensemble, P12+ predictive simulation) may exploit the primitive when the corpus has subject-attribution noise that fact_graph cannot resolve.
